comments: Repeat of Judas Priest's concert at Hammersmith Odeon 21st November 1981 on the 'World Wide Blitz' tour in support of Point Of Entry
Given the file lengths, presumably there are some tracks missing before the Friday Night Connection.

track_listing.track: Can't Live Without You (LP - Blackout) Harvest
Snortin' Whiskey, Drinkin' Cocaine (LP - Crash And Burn) Polydor
Too Much Love To Hide (LP - Daylight Again) Atlantic
Losing My Grip (LP - Shock Tactics) RCA
Valley Girl (LP - Ship Arriving Too Late To Save A Drowning Witch) Barking Pumpkin
